title: Unit Circle Values for Cosine
text: Recall the angles on the unit circle where the x-coordinate (cosine value) is positive $$\frac{1}{2}$$.

title: General Solutions for Cosine
text: Remember that cosine has a period of $$2\pi$$. If $$\theta$$ is a solution, then $$\theta$$ + $$2pik$$ is also a solution for any integer k.
